name: Prospect Resources Limited
description: Prospect Resources Limited (ASX: PSC) is an Australian-based exploration and development company focused on the discovery and advancement of critical mineral projects in sub-Saharan Africa. With a deeply experienced team, the company targets opportunities in electrification and battery metals, aiming to contribute to the future supply chain through the acquisition and development of high-potential assets. Prospect Resources is committed to creating a sustainable, value-driven business, leveraging its technical expertise to progress projects from exploration through to production, thereby supporting the global transition to a cleaner energy future.
